proposed_entries.title: Workbench shell is the chassis; new domains mount as left-rail entries
proposed_entries.body: The frozen seven-domain Workbench shell is the canonical UI rulebook. Any new product domain (Ops, Build, Plan, etc.) mounts inside it as a left-rail entry rather than launching its own shell.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'rule' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}
